key.name: history-length
key.description: Controls length of the clipboard history.

key.name: debug-logging
key.description: When enabled, Mano writes debug messages to the journal. Off by default.

key.name: history-expiry-days
key.description: Automatically delete non-favorite items older than this many days when the extension starts. 0 disables expiry.

key.name: global-shortcut
key.description: Controls global shortcut.

key.name: incognito-shortcut
key.description: Controls global shortcut.

key.name: is-in-incognito
key.description: Mano will not track clipboard if true.

key.name: database-location
key.description: Stores clipboard history.

key.name: paste-on-select
key.description: Allow Mano to paste content on select.

key.name: send-notification-on-copy
key.description: Sends notification when copying a new content.

key.name: play-audio-on-copy
key.description: Plays an audio when copying a new content.

key.name: keep-search-entry
key.description: Keep search entry when Mano hides.

key.name: show-indicator
key.description: Shows an indicator on top panel.

key.name: wiggle-indicator
key.description: Wiggles the indicator.

key.name: link-previews
key.description: Allow Mano to visit links on your clipboard to generate link previews. Disabled by default for privacy; when enabled, Mano only fetches public http(s) addresses and refuses private, loopback and link-local hosts.

key.name: open-links-in-browser
key.description: Allow Mano to open links on your default browser.

key.name: session-only-mode
key.description: When enabled, Mano will clear all history on logout/restart/shutdown.

key.name: sync-primary
key.description: Sync primary selection with clipboard selection.

key.name: watch-exclusion-list
key.description: When enabled, Mano will not track clipboard from excluded apps

key.name: exclusion-list
key.description: Excludes clipboard tracking for windows that has class name listed in here.

key.name: terminal-list
key.description: Window classes (matched as a case-insensitive substring of the focused window) that should be pasted into with Ctrl+Shift+V instead of Ctrl+V when "paste on select" is enabled.

key.name: item-size
key.description: Controls size of the clipboard item.

key.name: window-background-color
key.description: window-background-color

key.name: incognito-window-background-color
key.description: incognito-window-background-color

key.name: search-bar-font-family
key.description: search-bar-font-family

key.name: search-bar-font-size
key.description: search-bar-font-size

key.name: item-title-font-family
key.description: item-title-font-family

key.name: item-title-font-size
key.description: item-title-font-size

key.name: item-date-font-family
key.description: item-date-font-family

key.name: item-date-font-size
key.description: item-date-font-size

key.name: active-item-border-color
key.description: active-item-border-color

key.name: hovered-item-border-color
key.description: hovered-item-border-color
